creator: markj@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to crypt47 from comment #8)
Ok, I was going off of the fact that the version field is set to 13.0-STABLE.

Based on the vmcores you're running unpatched 13.0-RELEASE.  There's one bug fixed in p1 which might be relevant, since you appear to be using ipfw: https://www.freebsd.org/security/advisories/FreeBSD-EN-21:12.divert.asc

Do you have any rules involving divert sockets?
